summary: Iteration 131: Tested Cosmic Harmonics Engine with celestial awareness. All features working correctly - backend APIs return valid moon phase, solar cycle, zodiac transit data. SmartDock Cosmos panel displays celestial info with one-tap frequency play. VR page shows celestial badge and adapts 3D scene. Video muted attribute removed for sound.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cosmic Harmonics Engine fully implemented. Backend /api/harmonics/celestial returns moon phase (waxing_gibbous ~92% illumination), solar cycle (Blue Hour), zodiac (Taurus/Earth), guidance with recommended frequency (417Hz), and atmosphere settings. SmartDock has Cosmos button (dock-harmonics) with Moon icon that opens HarmonicsPanel showing all celestial data with one-tap frequency play. VR page has celestial badge in top-right showing moon phase + zodiac. VR 3D scene adapts nebula colors based on celestial atmosphere accent. Video element in VR Story Theater does NOT have muted attribute (sound works). Both SmartDock and CosmicToolbar are hidden on VR page but visible on dashboard.

backend_harmonics_atmosphere.returns: moon_phase, moon_illumination, bg, accent, particle_density, nebula_intensity

displays.moon_phase: Waxing Gibbous with glyph and 92% lit
displays.zodiac: Taurus with Earth element and Stability theme
displays.celestial_guidance: Fine-tuning, trusting the process, preparing for fulfillment

harmonics_play_button.functionality: One-tap activates recommended frequency tone with binaural beat

vr_celestial_badge.displays: Moon phase (Waxing Gibbous) + Zodiac (Taurus Earth) + Solar period (Blue Hour)

vr_video_sound_fix.muted_attribute: REMOVED - video has autoPlay loop playsInline only
